'''竏嘖h-h-sh''' ('''kashahash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quit|quit]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-h-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quit|quit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嘖h-h-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kashahash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishahash|thishahash]] || [[word:jishahash|jishahash]] || [[word:shishahash|shishahash]] || [[word:kishahash|kishahash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushahash|thuthushahash]] || [[word:jujushahash|jujushahash]] || [[word:shushushahash|shushushahash]] || [[word:kukushahash|kukushahash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushahash|thushahash]] || [[word:jushahash|jushahash]] || [[word:shushahash|shushahash]] || [[word:kushahash|kushahash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushahash|thushahash]] || [[word:jushahash|jushahash]] || [[word:shushahash|shushahash]] || [[word:kushahash|kushahash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshahash|theshahash]] || [[word:jeshahash|jeshahash]] || [[word:sheshahash|sheshahash]] || [[word:keshahash|keshahash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshahash|thothoshahash]] || [[word:jojoshahash|jojoshahash]] || [[word:shoshoshahash|shoshoshahash]] || [[word:kokoshahash|kokoshahash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshahash|thoshahash]] || [[word:joshahash|joshahash]] || [[word:shoshahash|shoshahash]] || [[word:koshahash|koshahash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshahash|thoshahash]] || [[word:joshahash|joshahash]] || [[word:shoshahash|shoshahash]] || [[word:koshahash|koshahash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦshahash|thﾃｦshahash]] || [[word:jﾃｦshahash|jﾃｦshahash]] || [[word:shﾃｦshahash|shﾃｦshahash]] || [[word:kﾃｦshahash|kﾃｦshahash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashahash|thathashahash]] || [[word:jajashahash|jajashahash]] || [[word:shashashahash|shashashahash]] || [[word:kakashahash|kakashahash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashahash|thashahash]] || [[word:jashahash|jashahash]] || [[word:shashahash|shashahash]] || [[word:kashahash|kashahash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashahash|thashahash]] || [[word:jashahash|jashahash]] || [[word:shashahash|shashahash]] || [[word:kashahash|kashahash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashahash|shashahash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashahash|goshashahash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashahash|gokishashahash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashahashnﾃｼ|shashahashnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashahashnknﾃｼ|goshashahashnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashahashnﾃｼ|gokishashahashnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashahashﾃｫ|shashahashﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashahashnkshﾃｫ|goshashahashnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashahashﾃｫ|gokishashahashﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashahashro|shashahashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashahashnkro|goshashahashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashahashro|gokishashahashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashahashmu|shashahashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashahashnkmu|goshashahashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashahashmu|gokishashahashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashahasher|shashahasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashahashnksher|goshashahashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashahasher|gokishashahasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashahashng|shashahashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashahashnkng|goshashahashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashahashng|gokishashahashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashahashya|shashahashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashahashnkya|goshashahashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashahashya|gokishashahashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashahashyam|shashahashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashahashnkyam|goshashahashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashahashyam|gokishashahashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashahashnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shashahashnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashahashnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshashahashnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashahashnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishashahashnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashahashnﾃｼro|shashahashnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashahashnknﾃｼro|goshashahashnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashahashnﾃｼro|gokishashahashnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashahashnﾃｼmu|shashahashnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashahashnknﾃｼmu|goshashahashnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashahashnﾃｼmu|gokishashahashnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashahashﾃｫnﾃｼ|shashahashﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashahashnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshashahashnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashahashﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishashahashﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashahashﾃｫro|shashahashﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashahashnkshﾃｫro|goshashahashnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashahashﾃｫro|gokishashahashﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashahashﾃｫmu|shashahashﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashahashnkshﾃｫmu|goshashahashnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashahashﾃｫmu|gokishashahashﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashahashronﾃｼ|shashahashronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashahashnkronﾃｼ|goshashahashnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashahashronﾃｼ|gokishashahashronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashahashroshﾃｫ|shashahashroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashahashnkroshﾃｫ|goshashahashnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashahashroshﾃｫ|gokishashahashroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashahashromu|shashahashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashahashnkromu|goshashahashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashahashromu|gokishashahashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashahashmunﾃｼ|shashahashmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashahashnkmunﾃｼ|goshashahashnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashahashmunﾃｼ|gokishashahashmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashahashmushﾃｫ|shashahashmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashahashnkmushﾃｫ|goshashahashnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashahashmushﾃｫ|gokishashahashmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashahashmuro|shashahashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashahashnkmuro|goshashahashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashahashmuro|gokishashahashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
